summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kaisō Sushi España reservation system after fixes. ALL CRITICAL ISSUES RESOLVED. Backend APIs 100% functional (14/14 tests passed). Frontend fully functional including the previously broken calendar date selection. Full reservation flow working end-to-end with success page and admin panel.
passed_tests: Backend API tests: 14/14 passed (100% success rate)
CRITICAL FIX: Calendar date selection now working with react-day-picker v9
Full reservation flow: date → period (lunch/dinner) → time slot → form → submit
Success page displays full-screen with sushi background image
Success page shows reservation details in gold color (#C9A24A)
Success page navigation buttons 'Volver al Inicio' and 'Ver Nuestro Menú' work
Admin panel loads and shows all 4 stats cards correctly
Admin panel week view shows reservations across dates
Admin panel day/week toggle functionality working
Admin panel date navigation and filters working
Admin panel close button returns to homepage
Backend GET /api/reservations returns all reservations for admin panel
Email integration configured (SMTP credentials expected limitation)
Responsive design and dark theme with gold accents implemented correctly
